race.comment: LOS ALAMITOS (5) hit the line well to be beaten just a length over this course and distance two starts back. Stepped up in trip last time at Doomben but was a spent force a long way from home. Big chance to bounce back on his return to 1400m. SATURDAYS GIRL (8) was lining up for the 16th time when she chimed in late but just missed over 1350m at Ipswich on 14 March. At her best at or around today's journey. Hard to be too confident with a record like hers but the last two efforts have been close to her best. KADESKY (4) raced handy then battled on well without threatening first-up over 1200m at Doomben. Enjoys a nice run again from the inside gate and the step up today's journey should help the cause. DELICIOUS DEREK (2) is mixing his form. Best efforts measure up but 1400m is probably as far as he wants. THE AVIATOR (7) is lightly raced and getting to this trip for the first time is a tick.
